title: digitalis × valinii
intro: Digitalis × valinii is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Digitalis purpurea (foxglove) and Digitalis valgaris, both members of the foxglove family (Apocynaceae). The medicinal properties of Digitalis × valinii lie in its cardiotonic and diuretic effects, which can help to strengthen the heart and increase urine production. This plant has been used to treat conditions such as congestive heart failure, atrial fibrillation, and other cardiovascular diseases due to its ability to regulate heart rhythm and improve overall cardiac function. Herbal preparations of Digitalis × valinii can be found in the form of tinctures, capsules, and dried leaves, although caution should be exercised when using this plant due to its potential toxicity.
